headline: Berkshire Expands Insurance Reach With Strait Of Hormuz War Risk Cover
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.A) has joined a U.S. backed initiative to provide shipping insurance through the Strait of Hormuz. The company is participating alongside Travelers to offer wartime risk coverage in this key maritime corridor. This move expands Berkshire’s insurance activities into a geopolitically sensitive region with higher risk profiles. This development sits squarely within Berkshire’s core identity as a major global insurer. However, the focus on wartime risk in the Strait...
